zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Barrel於1493年出生在英國。她和John Rippingale至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1567年4月2日在英國艾可貝盧哈普 沃爾特享年74歲，埋葬在英國艾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Barrel于1493年出生在英国。她和John Rippingale至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1567年4月2日在英国艾可貝盧哈普 沃爾特享年74岁，埋葬在英国艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Barrel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Barrell
meanings: from Middle English barel ‘barrel, cask’, Old French baril, hence a metonymic occupational name for a cooper or possibly to denote someone with a rotund figure or who drank excessively.
habitational name from Barwell in Leicestershire, named with Old English bār ‘wild boar’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Barrel was born in 1493, in England. She had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with John Rippingale. She died on 2 April 1567, in Belchamp Walter, Essex, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Barrel est née en 1493, à Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec John Rippingale. Elle est décédée le 2 avril 1567, à Belchamp Walter, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Barrel wurde 1493 in England geboren. Sie hatte mit John Rippingale mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. April 1567 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Belchamp Walter, Essex, England und wurde in Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Barrel è nata il nel 1493 nel England. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con John Rippingale. Morì il 2 aprile 1567, nel Belchamp Walter, Essex, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Barrelは1493年にイギリスで生まれた。彼女はJohn Rippingaleとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1567年4月2日にイギリスエセックスベルチャンップ ワルターで74歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Barrel(은)는 1493년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 John Rippingale(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1567년 4월 2일 영국 에세스 벨챔프 월터에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Barrel nasceu em 1493, em Inglaterra. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com John Rippingale. Ela faleceu em 2 de abril de 1567, em Belchamp Walter, Essex, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Barrel родилась в 1493 г. в местности Англия. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от John Rippingale. Она умерла 2 апреля 1567 г. в местности белчамп валтир, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Barrel nació en 1493, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con John Rippingale. Murió el 2 de abril de 1567, en Belchamp Walter, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Essex, Inglaterra.
